view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario of package transfer.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario of package transfer.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the outcome of transferring a package to another customer, but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms the existence of a transfer contract or the necessary lifecycle states for the booking transfer. The linked use case outlines the requirements for a successful transfer, including the need for a transfer contract and specific lifecycle states, but these elements are not evidenced in the prior steps. Therefore, the validation cannot be completed as the necessary information is lacking.

gaps: No transfer contract record linked to booking order.
No evidence of lifecycle states (Pending/accepted/rejected/expired) for bookings or transfers.
